title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Scientist II Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has issued an official notification for the recruitment of various Project Scientist II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply on or before the last date of a...
